title: erigeron aequifolius
intro: Erigeron aequifolius, also known as sea orache, is a type of flowering plant in the family Amaranthaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and providing relief from colds and respiratory issues. Erigeron aequifolius is commonly prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal purposes.
